archetype_reasoning: The IT Business Analyst context demands high data density, functional clarity, and authority. The Dark Theme aligns with the modern dev/tech environment requested, reducing eye strain during long sessions while allowing critical data (kanban tags, charts) to stand out sharply.

rules: Headings strictly use Chivo, avoid Inter for headings.
Labels/Overlines must be uppercase JetBrains Mono with generous tracking.
No jumping hierarchy gaps (H1 -> H2, not H1 -> H4).

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous padding: p-6 or p-8 for cards instead of default p-4 to allow data to breathe.
rules: Use 'Control Room' dense grid strategy for the dashboard.
Subtle 1px borders (border-white/10) instead of heavy shadows.
No pure black backgrounds - use the tinted obsidian base.

components.cards: Flat background (#131418), 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color brightens to border-white/20.
components.buttons: Primary: Solid #FF5E00 background, #0A0A0B text, crisp square edges (rounded-sm), strong hover contrast. Secondary: Transparent with border-white/10, text-white, hover bg-white/5.
components.kanban_cards: Neo-brutalist tech edge. rounded-sm, border-white/10. Use left border color-coding for status (e.g., border-l-2 border-l-[#00E5FF] for In Progress).
components.modals: Glassmorphism for overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Modal content uses solid #131418 with border-white/10.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Dark background, 1px border, focus state uses focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF5E00] focus:border-[#FF5E00].
components.tree_view: Clear indentations using solid vertical lines (border-l border-white/10). Expand/collapse icons using Phosphor or Lucide.
components.nav_header: Sticky top, crystal glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/80), bottom border border-white/5. Must contain Logo and primary user actions.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must have defined hover states changing background or border. Text color must stay accessible.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific transition properties (e.g., transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform).
motion_and_interaction.drag_drop: Kanban drag operations should rotate the card slightly (rotate-2) and increase border opacity.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text against #131418 meets APCA guidelines. Use Text Shadow on images if needed.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'kanban-task-card', 'create-task-btn').

media_and_icons.icon_library_reason: Matches the technical, dense dashboard requirement with crisp, geometric duotone/regular variants.

login_background.usage: Use as a full-cover, low-opacity (opacity-20 to 30) background on the Google Login screen to give it depth and a premium feel.

avatar_1.usage: Use as dummy user avatar in header/settings.

avatar_2.usage: Use as dummy assignee avatar in Kanban cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette, do not use generic Tailwind colors like slate-900 everywhere. Use the exact hex codes or add them to tailwind.config.js.
For the Kanban board, use a robust drag-and-drop library (e.g., dnd-kit or react-beautiful-dnd) and design the columns with the specified borders.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Inject Google Fonts (Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono) into the index.html or layout file.
Implement the Google Login screen as the first entry point, using the provided architectural background image with a glassmorphism card over it.
Task details must include hierarchical rendering (Parent/Child). Indent children in a Tree View or visually link them in detail modals.
In the stats page, use Shadcn Charts (recharts) with the exact accent colors provided for consistency.
Ensure all buttons, cards, and inputs have the required data-testid.
